steps.description: Clone the upstream repository into the model-local directory to validate the repo-native standalone ASR path.
Create an isolated model-local Python 3.10 environment without mutating host conda state.
Prepare the local environment for dependency resolution.
Attempt the repository-native runtime dependency plan first to collect executable evidence.

Only if the upstream CUDA-pinned plan fails with a diagnosed compatibility error, retry with a model-local CPU-installable dependency plan while keeping the same standalone FireRedAsr2 AED runtime path.
Download the official AED checkpoint bundle into the model-local weights directory.
Run import/load/infer/contract against the selected shared English 16k fixture and capture structured output.

notes: Weights must resolve to pretrained_models/FireRedASR2-AED under the model directory. No global cache-only success is acceptable without recorded fallback rationale.
ffmpeg conversion is not planned because the selected shared fixture already satisfies the repository audio format requirement.
If pip requirements prove incompatible on this CPU-only host, failure must enter DIAGNOSE/REPLAN before any backend or runtime-family switch.
A targeted retry has been authorized only for the diagnosed CUDA-specific dependency incompatibility at BUILD_ENV.
